title: Electric Studio Frame
summary: Two-panel split with quote as hero — white/blue panels open from center, accent bar grows, quote reveals line by line.

origin.name: none (original preset by the L2 skill author)
origin.reference: No specific real-world studio; the 'Electric Studio' look is an original preset composed by the frontend-slides author

provenance.transformation: Static slide preset → animated hyperframes timeline (white/blue panels open from the center, a black accent bar grows on the seam, the quote reveals line by line across the divide) built as original CSS keyframes. Original sample data. No upstream source code copied verbatim.
